overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game showing a wizard character standing in the grand entrance hall of Hogwarts castle. The character observes other students in dark robes walking through the marble-floored hall, which features a central statue, grand staircases, and ornate stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle entrance hall with central statue and grand staircases

two students walking together toward the central statue

entered.detail: large white marble statue of a wizard on a rearing horse atop a tiered fountain base
wide stone staircase with balustrades ascending to upper levels
wide stone staircase with balustrades ascending to upper levels

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a grand gothic entrance hall with high ceilings and marble floors. A central statue of a wizard on a horse dominates the space, flanked by grand staircases on either side. The ego character stands near the entrance observing the moderate flow of students in dark robes walking through the hall. The lighting is artificial and atmospheric, casting soft shadows across the stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady observation of a grand gothic entrance hall, maintaining a focused gaze on the atmospheric activity within the space. It begins with a wide view of the high ceilings and polished marble floors, where the camera captures the ego character standing near the entrance. As the perspective settles, the view encompasses a central statue of a wizard on a horse, flanked by the sweeping curves of grand staircases. The scene then lingers on the moderate flow of students in dark robes moving through the hall, while artificial lighting casts soft, moody shadows across the ornate stone architecture.
